_comment: GENERATED from NimbleCoOrg/artefact-registry (artefacts.json -> bin/sync.mjs) — do not hand-edit; add or wire use-case templates in the registry. templates.name: Matilde — science assistant
templates.description: Academic research agent: verifiable citations (Crossref/OpenAlex/DataCite + retraction checks) and OpenNeuro/BIDS dataset discovery. Seeds the Matilde persona + research methodology.
